landing.hero_subtitle: From fresh milk to farm-ready cattle — all in one place. Trusted by thousands of families across Dhaka.

landing.how_step3_desc: Receive your fresh order at your doorstep, same day in Dhaka
landing.featured_subtitle: Our best-selling dairy products, delivered daily
landing.testimonial_1_text: The milk quality is outstanding. Fresh every morning and delivery is always on time. Our family has been buying from Alam Dairy for 3 years now.
landing.testimonial_2_text: The ghee is absolutely pure and fragrant. I've tried many brands but Alam Dairy's ghee tastes just like homemade. Highly recommend!
landing.testimonial_3_text: I bought cattle from Alam Dairy for Qurbani. The cattle were healthy and vet-certified. Very transparent and trustworthy business.
landing.cta_subtitle: Fresh dairy straight from our farm to your doorstep — order today and experience the Alam Dairy quality.
